1.13: ‚ÄôYite nde, Krist …ďakima ka yotu n…õ …ďaka? ‚ÄôYo ka Pol yi …ďo Ňčgbama k…õ kroa k…õto yun? Ho nde, k…õ yi …ďo t…Ēpuma n…õ wun…õ k…õ m…Ēr…Ēku k…õŐĀ, ‚Äô…ďo t…Ēpuma ka wun…õ n…õ …óin…Ē Pol?

Kasi …óyan…Ē te yi …ďom…Ē n…õŐÄ …óyan…Ē te yi Njambiy…õ

1.20: Ma ndana, nda …ďa n…õ …óyan…Ē k…Ē? Ma nda …ďa m…Ē k…õtina m…õyasi k…Ē? Ma m…Ē j…õŇč duwaŐß l…õpi te yi Ňčgim…Ē te y…Ēk…Ē …ďa nda? ‚ÄôNjambiy…õ tiŐÄ kel…õ ka nde, …óyan…Ē te yi …ďotu …ďe m…õn…õti maka kpaŐāl …ď…õ yasi a…ďalmba na?

2.9: Yasi w…õt…õ, yo kelnama nda yi yo k…õtinate k…õ m…õkana m…õn…õ nde: ‚ÄĻYasi te yi misi tiŐÄ …ď…õŇč…õ n…õ toru n…õŐÄ yi m…õt…Ē tiŐÄ wok…õ n…õ toru, yasi te yi tem…Ē mum…Ē tiŐÄ tak…õ w…õt…õ yes…Ē, yo yasi te yi Njambiy…õ kombila p…õ yi …ďotu …ďete …ďe kwa…óy…õ ny…õ …ďaka.‚Äļ

2.24: Wun…õ k…õ …ď…õŇč…õ kom…õte nde, Njambiy…õ p…õŐĀsi nde, mum…Ē m…õ n…õ ŇčgbeŇč k…õ mb…Ēmbu wen…õ, k…õto m…õkele, yeti ndi k…õto tikina tem…Ē na.

3.11: ‚ÄôKiya nj…õmbi Ňčg…õŐß w…õt…õ yakama punj…õ ka kim…Ē m…Ēr…Ēku, punj…õ sendi jona m…Ēr…Ēku?

3.13: Nda k…õ njoka yun n…õ …óyan…Ē, duw…õ sendi m…õyasi kim…Ē duwaŐßte k…Ē? 4.1: To m…õwona n…õŐÄ m…õtand…Ē wuŐĀla we k…õ njoka yun? ‚ÄôYo ti wuŐĀla k…õ …ďeya m…õwo…ď…Ē m…õte yi luŐß …óyambi tand…õ yan k…õ m…õdoku m…õ yotu yun k…õŐĀ na?

4.5: ‚ÄôWun…õ taŐĀka ka nde, yasi te yi m…õkana m…õ Njambiy…õ l…õp…õ k…õŐĀ kin…õ to te na? ∆ź nde: ‚ÄĻNjambiy…õ k…õ kwa…óy…õ sisiŇč te yi ny…õ nya wus…õ k…õ Ňčgim…Ē te yi ny…õ kusuma n…õ wus…õ k…õŐĀ …ďu…óyate. A g…ĒŐĀru nde, yo woŐākunaŇčgw…õ ndi gba n…õ ny…õ ny…õp…Ē.‚Äļ

5.7: ∆äete, wun…õ nj…ĒŇč, wun…õ gbiŐāsi kum…Ē k…õ Ňčgim…Ē te yi NyaŇčgw…õ Kumande ta nje k…õŐĀ.
